title: Making folders private - work around
excerpt: Just a discovery about privacy settings for folders.  It appears that in order to make a folder private, all boards within the folder must be set to private.  Users cannot set up the folder initially as private.  If any …

posts.author: JIvan (Jennifer Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml: Just a discovery about privacy settings for folders. It appears that in order to make a folder private, all boards within the folder must be set to private. Users cannot set up the folder initially as private. If any of the boards are public, then the folder becomes visible and that (those) boards that are not set to private will be visible. The private folders will not be visible.

posts.author: JIvan (Jennifer Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml: The last sentence should read: “The private boards will not be visible”.

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: There should be a Open/Private setting at the Folder level, instead of having to set each board within that folder.
